pages.title: Meteor tier
pages.text: The meteor tool tier sits between diamond and netherite — slightly higher mining speed (7.0), slightly higher attack damage (+3), and ~18 enchantability.$(br2)Durability: 2341 uses. Matches netherite's harvest level.

pages.title: Meteor Pickaxe
pages.text: Mines anything netherite can mine. The default choice for deep-stone work.

pages.title: Meteor Axe
pages.text: Standard axe behavior — chopping and sweeping attacks with meteor-tier damage.

pages.title: Meteor Shovel
pages.text: For fast-clearing softer terrain; paths dirt blocks like any shovel.

pages.title: Meteor Hoe
pages.text: Best-in-slot for farm prep. Meteor-tier durability keeps it going for a very long time.

pages.title: Meteor Sword
pages.text: The baseline meteor weapon. Pairs exceptionally well with the $(l:gear/enchantments)Lunar Edge$() enchantment.
